name: blueprint
description: Authors and manages durable blueprints (plan-only — no execution or resume verbs): /blueprint:create interrogates + decomposes into scoped packages (per-package ledgers with write-sets, a dependency DAG, testable done-criteria) gated by a fresh-context auditor; /blueprint:manage lists/views/audits/archives. Host-usable. The blueprints it produces are executed by the sandbox-only butler plugin (/butler:dispatch-fleet or /butler:drive-solo).
